projects.name: Nyc Taxi Anomaly Detector
projects.description: Real-time NYC taxi trip anomaly detection pipeline. Kafka producer streams synthetic trip data at 50 msgs/sec. projects.name: Llm Pipeline Optimizer
projects.description: AI-powered SQL query optimizer using Anthropic Claude API. Three-stage pipeline: (1) Static analysis via sqlglot AST — detects 11 anti-patterns including SELECT *, cartesian joins, leading wildcards, nested subqueries, NOT IN subqueries.
